Appearances:
Plaintiff TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC, is present. Represented by
Attorney PAUL HOGARTH, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant RAYMOND MICHELETTI, is present.
Attorney SEBASTIAN KAPLAN, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem BARBARA ANSCHER , litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of JULY 5, 2011 is vacated.
